positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a majestic, mythological fox spirit surrounded by cosmic, bioluminescent flora and swirling nebula gas. The fox should have striking, ethereal fur texture and dynamic pose, like leaping or standing vigil. Utilize a vaporwave aesthetic mixed with traditional Japanese Ukiyo-e motifs. The colors should be deep indigo, vibrant teal, neon magenta, and soft gold, creating strong contrast against deep black space. The design must be highly graphic and scalable, suitable for screen printing on fabric, focusing on clean silhouettes and bold linework. Full body shot, central framing, high contrast lighting, deep depth of field. Minimalist celestial elements guiding the flow.
negative: low resolution, blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, gradient fade, messy edges, cropped, extra limbs, poor anatomy, blurry background
